Module com.hack23.cia.model.external.riksdagen.votering.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.external.riksdagen.votering.impl

Class BallotDocumentElement

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.external.riksdagen.votering.impl.BallotDocumentElement
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject, java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="BallotDocumentElement") public class BallotDocumentElement extends java.lang.Object implements com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject
The Class BallotDocumentElement.
